diagrams.title: Requirements to Design Process Flow
diagrams.description: This diagram illustrates the sequential flow from requirements gathering through analysis to design. It shows how stakeholder needs are captured as requirements, transformed into analysis models (use cases, domain models), then further refined into design models (class diagrams, component diagrams, sequence diagrams). Arrows indicate the iterative nature of the process where feedback flows back to refine earlier stages.
elements: Transition arrow from Requirements to Analysis
Transition arrow from Analysis to Design
diagrams.purpose: Explains the overall process workflow and how requirements transform into design models through systematic refinement

diagrams.title: Requirements to Design Model Traceability Matrix
diagrams.description: This diagram presents a matrix showing traceability between requirements and design elements. The left column lists different requirement types (functional, non-functional, constraints), the middle columns show analysis model elements, and the right columns display corresponding design model elements. Connection lines demonstrate how each requirement traces to specific design components, showing the 'why' behind design decisions.
elements: Analysis Model column with use cases
Analysis Model column with domain classes
Design Model column with design classes
Design Model column with architectural patterns
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrates the traceability link between what the system must do (requirements) and how it will be built (design), ensuring all requirements are addressed

diagrams.title: Analysis Classes to Design Classes Transformation
diagrams.description: This diagram shows the detailed mapping between analysis-level concepts and design-level constructs. It displays three types of analysis classes (Boundary classes representing interface elements, Entity classes representing persistent data, Control classes representing business logic) and shows how each transforms into corresponding design elements (UI components, database schemas, service classes, controller modules). Transformation rules are annotated on connecting lines.
diagrams.purpose: Explains how abstract analysis models are converted into concrete design structures, guiding developers on translating requirements understanding into implementable code structures
